videos.title: What is AI? And How Does it Work?
videos.description: This video from IBM Technology provides a clear and concise definition of Artificial Intelligence, explains its core goal, and introduces the different types of AI (ANI, AGI, ASI) along with foundational technologies like Machine Learning and Deep Learning.

videos.title: The AI Revolution: The Good, The Bad, and The Ugly
videos.description: Kurzgesagt – In a Nutshell offers an engaging and visually stunning exploration of AI's current capabilities, its potential future, and the profound implications—both positive and negative—it holds for humanity.

videos.title: AI Explained!
videos.description: Marques Brownlee (MKBHD) explains AI in simple terms by showcasing real-world examples and practical applications, helping viewers understand how AI impacts their daily lives, from smartphone features to personalized recommendations.

videos.title: Artificial Intelligence: Crash Course Computer Science #34
videos.description: CrashCourse provides a fast-paced yet comprehensive overview of AI's history, different approaches to building intelligent systems, and key concepts like machine learning, neural networks, and expert systems, setting a strong conceptual foundation.
